title: Smoked Rye Bake
description: A hearty and savory bread recipe that combines the deep flavors of rye and the richness of smoked ingredients.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, combine the rye flour, smoked bacon, caraway seeds, yeast, water, salt, molasses, and baking powder. Mix until a dough forms.
3. Add the eggs and butter to the dough and mix until well combined.
4. Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
5. Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour, or until it has doubled in size.
6. Punch down the dough and shape it into a round loaf.
7. Place the loaf on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
8. Bake the loaf in the preheated oven for 35-40 minutes, or until it is golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
9. Remove the loaf from the oven and let it cool on a wire rack for 10-15 minutes before slicing and serving.
10. Serve the Smoked Rye Bake warm, sliced and topped with butter or your favorite toppings.
